name: sjt-audit-skills
description: SJT Group CPA audit skills for Claude Code — CCH Axcess automation, risk assessment, FS reviews, sampling, and workpaper tooling.

plugins.name: sjt-audit-sampling
plugins.description: Plan and pull audit samples from a trial balance — FS substantive, walkthrough, EBP, and single-audit samples.

plugins.name: sjt-binder-organize
plugins.description: Files audit documents into 4-digit indexed CCH Axcess binder sections.

plugins.name: sjt-cch-axcess
plugins.description: Backend-first automation for the CCH Axcess audit platform — binders, Knowledge Coach forms, TB/JE reports.

plugins.name: sjt-cch-form-fill
plugins.description: Fills CCH Axcess Knowledge Coach planning forms and audit program steps with context-aware, firm-standard answers.

plugins.name: sjt-cch-risk-assessment
plugins.description: Risk-assessment engine for CCH Axcess audits — drives the AUD-100 to KBA-400 to KBA-502 to audit-program cascade.

plugins.name: sjt-commercial-fs-review
plugins.description: Technical proof and review of commercial / private-company financial statements under U.S. GAAP.

plugins.name: sjt-ebp-fs-review
plugins.description: Technical proof and review of employee benefit plan (ERISA) financial statements and audit reports.

plugins.name: sjt-govt-fs-review
plugins.description: Technical proof and review of governmental financial statements — CAFR/ACFR, Single Audit, Yellow Book/GASB.

plugins.name: sjt-nonprofit-fs-review
plugins.description: Technical proof and review of nonprofit financial statements under U.S. GAAP (ASC 958).

plugins.name: sjt-workpaper-formatter
plugins.description: Creates and formats audit workpapers in the firm's standard house style.

plugins.name: sjt-workpapers
plugins.description: Builds audit workpapers in the firm's house style with reference libraries (incl. CCH XTbLink TB linking).
